mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Reviews ( store_id, user_number, category, review_content, rating ) VALUES ( #{storeId}, #{userNumber}, #{category}, #{reviewContent}, #{rating} )
mapper.select: SELECT Reviews.review_id, Reviews.store_id, Reviews.user_number, Reviews.category, Reviews.review_content, Reviews.rating, Reviews.created_date, Users.user_name AS nickname, Users.profile_image AS profileImage FROM Reviews JOIN Users ON Reviews.user_number = Users.user_number WHERE Reviews.store_id = #{storeId} ORDER BY Reviews.created_date DESC
